name: custom-formatter

metadata.name: custom-formatter
metadata.summary: A lightweight package for formatting and serializing messages.

documentation:
# Formatter

Formatter is a lightweight Python package for formatting and serializing messages. It simplifies the process of creating structured data for logging, notifications, and integrations with AWS services.

## Installation

```bash
pip install formatter
```

classes.name: formatter.formatter.MessageFormatter

methods.name: formatter.formatter.MessageFormatter.format_job_message
documentation:
Formats a job message as a dictionary.

Args:
    title (str): The title of the job posting.
    description (str): The description of the job posting.
    created_at (str): The creation timestamp of the job posting.

Returns:
    dict: A formatted dictionary containing the job details.

methods.name: formatter.formatter.MessageFormatter.to_json
documentation:
Converts a message dictionary to a JSON string.

Args:
    message (dict): The message to convert.

Returns:
    str: The message as a JSON string.

methods.name: formatter.formatter.MessageFormatter.from_json
documentation:
Parses a JSON string into a Python dictionary.

Args:
    json_string (str): The JSON string to parse.

Returns:
    dict: The parsed dictionary.
A utility class for formatting and serializing messages.
